title: Balboa Heights heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Balboa Heights with a Z-Score of +4.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Balboa Heights has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.8 km/h. 
 The heat wave has led to a critical situation, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, indicating a significant anomaly in the weather pattern.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
